title: How to Pull and Analyze Polymarket Event Data (No-Code)
description: Learn how to connect to Polymarket’s Events List endpoint, filter and analyze structured event data, and export datasets, from anywhere in the world — no code required.
excerpt: Lychee is your quant in a box.
